race.description: Caffreys Black Stout King Richard III Cup Handicap
race.comment: FAST TRACK HARRY (5) was below his best last time when seventh beaten 5L over 1200m at Kempton Park. Keeping fresh and an immediate bounce back possible. Cannot be dismissed. ZOULU CHIEF (10) returns after placing on his only outing last prep over 1200m at Lingfield. Billy Loughnane retaining the ride is a positive and looks well positioned to be in the mix. BERKSHIRE WHISPER (6) resumed with a solid third trying 1200m at Newcastle. Finished strongly beaten 4L. Finds something easier and rates a genuine chance. TEN POUNDS (2) has not been seen since running eighth beaten 4L attempting 1200m at Newcastle. Holds claims to be making the top three.
